subject: WM-0064 review: changes_requested
body: High: town-rule compliance ignores stored trigger/action and evaluates every same subject/region/time rule, making those mechanical fields inert; High: stored exception lane is not honored, emergency rejects even rules with exception=0; Medium: obligation due query consumes candidateCap before due-window filtering, so matching later rows can be missed and reported as no_candidate. Required checks and pnpm quality pass mechanically.
